bodyPreview: This report analyzes 600,000+ genetic variants to help you understand your genetic risks for certain skin issues, while also providing personalized diet, lifestyle and supplement recommendations to improve the condition of your skin and hair. Discover your body’s blueprint to healthy skin With this DNA report, you’ll get:: Personalized polygenic genetic risk scores for 14 key topics related to your skin health Insights about how your genes affect serious skin conditions such as eczema or aesthetic conditions such as skin elasticity and stretch marks A personalized and prioritized list of recommendations based on your unique genes Polygenic risk score results for 7 of the 14 topics covered in the Skin Health DNA Report Science-backed & detailed This report includes hundreds of clickable scientific references and gives detailed information about your risk scores, what they mean and how to address them. Personalized risk score for stretch marks Prioritized recommendations for skin hydration
visibleParagraphs: Prime Day Sale | Up to 60% off + free worldwide shippingOrder Now
